_comment: Hand-curated venue-name variants that are the SAME physical place. Different sources spell a venue differently (or use the festival name / an old name / an Instagram handle), which leaves the same event showing as several cards. `aliases` maps any spelling (case/accent-insensitive) to the canonical name; `coords` gives each canonical name a coordinate so even a source that sent no location can be matched and merged. Applied before dedupe. Keep this conservative: only add a pair when it is unambiguously the same place.

aliases.MACAM: MACAM – Museu de Arte Contemporânea Armando Martins
aliases.MACAM - Museu de Arte Contemporânea: MACAM – Museu de Arte Contemporânea Armando Martins
aliases.Macam - Museu De Arte Contemporânea Arma: MACAM – Museu de Arte Contemporânea Armando Martins
aliases.MAAT: MAAT - Museu de Arte, Arquitetura e Tecnologia
